title: Add Unsupported Claim Regression Gate
outOfScope: Universal semantic understanding or LLM-internal state detection.

sources.reason: Existing known-risk scenario coverage to preserve while formalizing the gate name.
Existing evidence and trust signal boundary.
Trust Layer evidence and non-goal terminology.

riskAssessment.reason: Deterministic local evidence gate with explicit semantic coverage limits.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the serial remediation plan and this is a local regression gate.

preReviewWarnings: Review that the gate detects unsupported external claims, not internal model state, and preserves the known-risk boundary.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Formal naming uses Unsupported Claim Regression Gate while Delusion remains only a compatibility/demo alias.
The gate blocks six unsupported-claim scenarios and allows an evidence-backed claim.
Every result records state, reason, evidence, resume condition, and policy reference.
The Make quality path runs the enforced gate and documentation states its limits.
guidelines: Use evidence-backed external claim terminology; never claim LLM-internal detection.
Keep the regression gate deterministic, local, and fail-closed.

intent.problem: The existing regression suite uses Delusion terminology and does not provide a dedicated executable gate for unsupported external claims.
constraints: Do not change critical-domain policy semantics.
Do not infer universal multilingual or internal-model behavior.
intent.rationale: A deterministic evidence evaluator and enforced Make target make unsupported claims reviewable without overstating what the repository can detect.

rawUserRequest: 继续，循环到所有任务全部完成，中途不要停。

declaredIntent.summary: Formalize the unsupported external claim regression gate and preserve known-risk boundaries.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the serial remediation plan and full Work Item lifecycle.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
